creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 241311
Update to 5.10.1 + remove obsolete patch

Update to 5.10.1 (see https://lists.gnu.org/archive/html/info-gnu/2022-02/msg00001.html).

While here, remove now useless patch to man/Makefile*: All supported FreeBSD versions have a 'date' that knows about '-r <filename>'.
